label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the passage carefully to find out why Mrs. Edney let Elijah's hair grow so long. The key part is in the second paragraph where Mrs. Edney says, "Elijah has always had beautiful hair, so I let him grow it as he wanted." So she allowed his hair to grow because he had beautiful hair, not specifically for charity which was a later decision. The reason she mentions is the beauty of the hair. The charity part came after when they decided to donate it once he wanted a haircut. So looking at the options: (A) Because Elijah has beautiful hair. - This
